name: Goat Hoarder
description: Circle 4 (Greed) — gold-encrusted goat obsessed with treasure. Fights to protect its hoard.

textToImageTask.prompt: A bipedal humanoid goat demon in A-pose, hunched greedy posture clutching a sack of gold coins overflowing in one arm, the other arm has fingers fused into a golden claw from touching too much cursed gold, gold-plated horns, patchy brown fur with gold flecks embedded in the skin, wearing mismatched stolen armor pieces of different metals, digitigrade goat legs with gold-tipped hooves, greedy gleaming gold eyes, stylized dark fantasy game character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Hunched bipedal goat demon clutching gold sack, golden claw hand, gold-plated horns, mismatched armor, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Patchy brown fur with gold fleck growths, gold-plated horn surface, mismatched copper-iron-brass armor pieces, overflowing gold coin sack, cursed golden claw
